name: Adventures in the Forgotten Realms

draft.notes: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 basic land, 1 ad card. If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare. Ad card may be a double-faced placeholder. Four variations of each basic land; showcase lands are gutter-cut.

sourceNotes: Large set of the era, no double-faced cards. Printed US, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box.
